stickyBar.message: New jobs are posted every hour. Don't miss yours.

hero.headline1: Your next job has already been posted.
hero.headline2: You just haven't seen it yet.
hero.subheading: We monitor hundreds of sites automatically. You get the right jobs with a resume optimized to pass through the ATS.

problem.headline: The reality of job hunting today
problem.pain1: of resumes are discarded by bots before a human ever sees them
problem.pain2: lost per week searching for jobs manually across dozens of sites
problem.pain3: of ideal jobs are filled before you even find out about them

radar.title: Job Radar
radar.description: Automatic monitoring across hundreds of sites. Get alerts for the right jobs for your profile in real-time.

ats.title: AI ATS Analysis
ats.description: Find out exactly why your resume is being rejected and fix it before sending. Compatibility score + suggestions.
ats.scoreSummary: The candidate shows strong backend experience with Java and Spring Boot, but lacks details in payments and technical leadership.
ats.strength1Title: Microservices experience with Java and Spring Boot
ats.strength1Desc: Foundation for the role's architecture, including scalable distributed systems.
ats.strength2Title: Practical knowledge in Kubernetes and CI/CD
ats.strength2Desc: Important for high availability and secure deploy pipelines.
ats.gap1Title: Missing experience with payments and authorization systems.
ats.gap1Desc: Payment cycles and fintech critical for the role.
ats.gap2Title: No proof of technical leadership and mentorship.
ats.suggestion1Text: Include keywords for payments and technical leadership.
ats.suggestion1Example: Software Developer focused on backend and cloud environments...
ats.finalText: Focus on aligning your experience with payments and fintech keywords.

pdf.title: Optimized Resume
pdf.description: Generate a customized resume for each job in seconds. Formatted to pass automatic filters.
pdf.emailHint: Or send the full analysis by email
